pages.text: When hung next to a $(item)Bed$(), this Dream Weaver will add $(item)Haste$() to a player when they wake up from a good nights sleep. If the Dream Weaver is corrupted by a nearby $(l:artifacts/dream_weavers/nightmares)Dream Weaver of Nightmares$(/l) the Weaver will instead inflict $(item)Mining Fatigue$().
